name: International Economics
note: Only one of Economics or International Economics may be elected. Students majoring in economics or international economics may not minor in either economics or international economics.

sections.label: Two Foreign Language Courses
sections.description: Two courses in foreign language numbered 115 or above.

sections.label: International Experience
sections.description: One of the following: a semester abroad, a May Term abroad, or a capstone project in international economics supervised by a member of the economics faculty.
